description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on push to tags, master, and dev branches, and on pull requests to those branches, but only for files in the QuickOSM directory. The workflow has four jobs: flake8, pylint, test-qgis, and release. The flake8 and pylint jobs set up Python 3.8, install dependencies, and run linters. The test-qgis job runs tests in a Docker environment. The release job depends on the other jobs, sets up Python 3.8, and creates a release on GitHub, including packaging and deploying the plugin, tweeting about the release, and dispatching a repository event.
